import { logger } from './src/utils/logger.js' import { Alpine, createPageMixin } from './src/alpine/index.js' document.addEventListener('alpine:init', () => { logger.info('[SysMaintainPage] 注册 Alpine 组件...') Alpine.data('sysMaintainPage', () => ({ ...createPageMixin(), // Tab配置 tabs: [ { id: 'settings', name: '系统配置', icon: '⚙️' }, { id: 'sessions', name: '会话管理', icon: '💬' }, { id: 'audit-logs', name: '操作审计', icon: '📋' }, { id: 'config-tools', name: '高级工具', icon: '🛠️' } ], // 当前选中的Tab currentTab: 'settings', init() { logger.info('[SysMaintainPage] 页面初始化') if (!this.checkAuth()) return // 从URL参数读取初始Tab const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search) const tabParam = urlParams.get('tab') if (tabParam && this.tabs.some(t => t.id === tabParam)) { this.currentTab = tabParam } }, switchTab(tabId) { this.currentTab = tabId // 更新URL参数 const url = new URL(window.location) url.searchParams.set('tab', tabId) window.history.pushState({}, '', url) logger.info('[SysMaintainPage] 切换Tab:', tabId) } })) logger.info('[SysMaintainPage] Alpine 组件已注册') })
